'''hagatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yoctolitre|yoctolitre]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yoctolitre|yoctolitre]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hagatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hægæthæth|hægæthæth]] || [[word:hægæthæj|hægæthæj]] || [[word:hægæthæsh|hægæthæsh]] || [[word:hægæthæ|hægæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hagagathath|hagagathath]] || [[word:hagagathaj|hagagathaj]] || [[word:hagagathash|hagagathash]] || [[word:hagagatha|hagagatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hagathath|hagathath]] || [[word:hagathaj|hagathaj]] || [[word:hagathash|hagathash]] || [[word:hagatha|hagatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hagafthath|hagafthath]] || [[word:hagafthaj|hagafthaj]] || [[word:hagafthash|hagafthash]] || [[word:hagafthaf|hagafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hagathatha|hagathatha]] || [[word:hagathaja|hagathaja]] || [[word:hagathasha|hagathasha]] || [[word:hagathaka|hagathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hagathath|hagathath]] || [[word:hagathaj|hagathaj]] || [[word:hagathash|hagathash]] || [[word:hagatha|hagatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hagathathal|hagathathal]] || [[word:hagathajal|hagathajal]] || [[word:hagathashal|hagathashal]] || [[word:hagathakal|hagathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hagathathatha|hagathathatha]] || [[word:hagathajaja|hagathajaja]] || [[word:hagathashasha|hagathashasha]] || [[word:hagathaka|hagathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hagathathan|hagathathan]] || [[word:hagathajan|hagathajan]] || [[word:hagathashan|hagathashan]] || [[word:hagathakan|hagathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hagathathaoro|hagathathaoro]] || [[word:hagathajaoro|hagathajaoro]] || [[word:hagathashaoro|hagathashaoro]] || [[word:hagathakaoro|hagathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
